Actions.Name: Copy Roles\📥 Import from file
Actions.Tooltip: Pick a previously-exported role file and import into the currently connected model

Actions.Name: Copy Roles\📤 Export to file
Actions.Tooltip: Export all roles + members + RLS filters to a timestamped JSON file in C:\\temp\\PBIRoleCopy

Actions.Name: Copy Roles\📤 Export — Select roles
Actions.Tooltip: Choose specific roles to export — filter, search, auto-select new roles

Actions.Name: Copy Roles\📥 Import — Select + Diff
Actions.Tooltip: Pick file, see NEW vs UPDATE diff, choose roles, dry run option

Actions.Name: Copy Roles\👥 Merge Members Only
Actions.Tooltip: Copy only members from source roles to target roles by matching role name (preserves target's RLS DAX). Skips roles not in target.
